title: Caramelized Crunchy German Sausage Tacos
description: A yeasty and snappy one-pot German dish featuring hard taco shells, caramelized onions, and German sausage, made in a Dutch oven, suitable for an ayurvedic tamasic diet
instructions: Heat the Dutch oven over medium heat and add the sliced onions, cooking until they are caramelized and golden brown
Add the German sausage to the pot, slicing it into thin rounds as it cooks
Add the beer, caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper to the pot, stirring to combine
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the liquid has reduced and the sausage is cooked through
Warm the hard taco shells according to package instructions
Assemble the tacos by spooning the sausage and onion mixture into the shells and topping with sauerkraut
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or chives, if desired
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days
